untranslatable_reason: Signal requires ATR-based position sizing and dynamic stop placement based on ATR multiples, which are risk management functions rather than entry/exit conditions. The core volatility-scaling logic cannot be fully expressed as simple indicator comparisons. Additionally, 'average true range over last 10 days' maps to atr_14 (closest available), but the exact 10-period ATR is not in the allowed indicator list.
translation_notes: Converted to context-dependent directional logic using true_range relative to atr_14 as a volatility filter. Entry triggers on price moving away from previous close with volatility confirmation. Exit on support/resistance (pivot) reversal. Stop loss set to 1.5x ATR equivalent (1.5% as decimal). For full implementation, backtest engine should apply position sizing scaling inversely proportional to recent ATR values.
